description:
Perform a comprehensive dental inventory on the loaded patient CBCT scan. 

1. Examine the Panoramic and Axial views to identify all present and missing teeth.
2. Open the Tooth Chart module in Blue Sky Plan.
3. Mark all missing teeth in the chart (default is present).
4. Create a text file at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\dental_inventory.txt' listing the findings.

The text file must follow this exact format:
DENTAL INVENTORY
Present teeth (Universal): 2, 3, ...
Missing teeth (Universal): 1, 16, ...
Total present: XX
Total missing: XX

Use the Universal Numbering System (1-32).
